text: Which set notation describes all even integers between 2 and 10 inclusive?
answer: \(\{ x \in \mathbb{Z} : 2 \leq x \leq 10 \text{ and } x \text{ is even} \}\)
a: \(\{ x \in \mathbb{Z} : 2 < x < 10 \text{ and } x \text{ is even} \}\)
b: \(\{ x \in \mathbb{Z} : 2 \leq x \leq 10 \text{ and } x \text{ is even} \}\)

answer: All integers greater than 0 and less than 5
b: All integers greater than 0 and less than 5
c: All positive real numbers less than 5
